creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This has to be the most unique house in all of London ✨ This is @mosaichousechiswick, home to artist @carriereichardt who has lovingly put mosaics across her home, free for the public to see. It’s taken her 25 years and it’s still not finished, and over 50 artists have contributed to it. Spot incredible details including the Cheshire Cat, the blue plaque, an entirely covered black cab and more!

📍4-6 Fairlawn Grove, London W4 5EL
It’s free to see but it’s someone’s home so you can’t go in ❤️
